project_context.title: Lameness Detection System
project_context.labeling_context: No clinical gold-standard labels; thresholds selected from manual + robust validation protocol

selection_rationale.method: Grid search + robust validation (v4, v5.1, v5.2) with manual validation sanity checks
why: Top or near-top across v5.1 full and v5.2 auto phase
Borderline scenario detection remains acceptable in overlap metric

manual_validation_policy.manual_final_role: v2.1 manual validation aligned with final defaults (persist_hours=7)
manual_final_primary_checks: Detectable injections overlap-detected on target cow under final defaults
Target cow (8081) gains +2 notifications in the before/after comparison
manual_validation_policy.manual_legacy_reference_role: Legacy manual validation kept as historical reference with old thresholds (persist_hours=6) and stricter event-level IoU20 success on both detectables

notes: Changing notebook BASE_PARAMS may change future validation results; this file freezes final project defaults and selection provenance.
manual_final points to the v2.1 run used for final-defaults demonstration; manual_legacy_reference preserves the historical manual baseline.
Existing run directories remain valid references and are not modified by this file.
